title: gh-141805: avoid increase the set->used twice when the __eq__ trigger another add
author: kemingy
body:
gh-141805: goes directly to the `found_unused_or_dummy` when finding a dummy slot in set.add

This avoids triggering the `__eq__` in the next iteration by the `PyObject_RichCompareBool`, which might introduce another `set.add` in the user code. Like:

```py
tasks = set()

class Corrupt:
    def __eq__(self, value):
        tasks.add(self)
        return False
```

As described in https://github.com/python/cpython/issues/141805#issuecomment-3584997981

please ensure that the PR title is in the following format:

```

```

Where: [X.Y] is the branch name, for example: [3.13].

GH-NNNNNN refers to the PR number from `main`.

-->

comments.author: kemingy
comments.body: Kindly ping @rhettinger, please take a look when you are free. Thanks!
